'''koshagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulminic|ulminic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulminic|ulminic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| koshagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshagithi|koshagithi]] || [[word:koshagiji|koshagiji]] || [[word:koshagishi|koshagishi]] || [[word:koshagiki|koshagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshaguthuthu|koshaguthuthu]] || [[word:koshagujuju|koshagujuju]] || [[word:koshagushushu|koshagushushu]] || [[word:koshagukuku|koshagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshaguthu|koshaguthu]] || [[word:koshaguju|koshaguju]] || [[word:koshagushu|koshagushu]] || [[word:koshaguku|koshaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshagufthuf|koshagufthuf]] || [[word:koshagufjuf|koshagufjuf]] || [[word:koshagufshuf|koshagufshuf]] || [[word:koshagufkuf|koshagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshagethe|koshagethe]] || [[word:koshageje|koshageje]] || [[word:koshageshe|koshageshe]] || [[word:koshageke|koshageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshagothotho|koshagothotho]] || [[word:koshagojojo|koshagojojo]] || [[word:koshagoshosho|koshagoshosho]] || [[word:koshagokoko|koshagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshagotho|koshagotho]] || [[word:koshagojo|koshagojo]] || [[word:koshagosho|koshagosho]] || [[word:koshagoko|koshagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshagofthof|koshagofthof]] || [[word:koshagofjof|koshagofjof]] || [[word:koshagofshof|koshagofshof]] || [[word:koshagofkof|koshagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfthĂŻf|koshagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfjĂŻf|koshagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfshĂŻf|koshagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfkĂŻf|koshagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|koshagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|koshagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|koshagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|koshagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfthĂŻf|koshagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfjĂŻf|koshagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfshĂŻf|koshagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfkĂŻf|koshagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfthĂŻf|koshagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfjĂŻf|koshagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfshĂŻf|koshagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:koshagĂŻfkĂŻf|koshagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshagĂŠthĂŠ|koshagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:koshagĂŠjĂŠ|koshagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:koshagĂŠshĂŠ|koshagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:koshagĂŠkĂŠ|koshagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshagathatha|koshagathatha]] || [[word:koshagajaja|koshagajaja]] || [[word:koshagashasha|koshagashasha]] || [[word:koshagakaka|koshagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshagatha|koshagatha]] || [[word:koshagaja|koshagaja]] || [[word:koshagasha|koshagasha]] || [[word:koshagaka|koshagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshagafthaf|koshagafthaf]] || [[word:koshagafjaf|koshagafjaf]] || [[word:koshagafshaf|koshagafshaf]] || [[word:koshagafkaf|koshagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:koshagasha|koshagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshagshĂ«asha|koshagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshagroasha|koshagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshagmuasha|koshagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshagyaasha|koshagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshagnkshĂ«asha|gokoshagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshagnkroasha|gokoshagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshagnkmuasha|gokoshagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshagnkyaasha|gokoshagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:koshashagasha|koshashagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshashagshĂ«asha|koshashagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshashagroasha|koshashagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshashagmuasha|koshashagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshashagyaasha|koshashagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshashagnkshĂ«asha|gokoshashagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshashagnkroasha|gokoshashagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshashagnkmuasha|gokoshashagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshashagnkyaasha|gokoshashagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:keshĂŠgasha|keshĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:keshĂŠgshĂ«asha|keshĂŠgshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:keshĂŠgroasha|keshĂŠgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:keshĂŠgmuasha|keshĂŠgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:keshĂŠgyaasha|keshĂŠgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokeshĂŠgnkshĂ«asha|gokeshĂŠgnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokeshĂŠgnkroasha|gokeshĂŠgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokeshĂŠgnkmuasha|gokeshĂŠgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokeshĂŠgnkyaasha|gokeshĂŠgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:koshfagasha|koshfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshfagshĂ«asha|koshfagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshfagroasha|koshfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshfagmuasha|koshfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshfagyaasha|koshfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshfagnkshĂ«asha|gokoshfagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshfagnkroasha|gokoshfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshfagnkmuasha|gokoshfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshfagnkyaasha|gokoshfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
